dj_text: Gulddreng - Se Mig Nu fades. Joey Moe - Smukkest På En Søndag emerges. Let it wash over you. Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: THIS IS PIRATE RADIO 404 FROM THE VOID! We don't need licenses! We don't need BODIES! We NEED VIBES!
hijack_text: Welcome, dear listeners of Mirror Dimension!
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Joey Moe - Smukkest På En Søndag
